features: Febreze 3Volution Air Freshener Sugarplum Delight continuously eliminates odours and alternates between 3 complementary scents for freshness you keep noticing. Lasts up to 90 days (if used 12h per day on low setting).
Discover the beauty of Sugarplum Delight now with 2X Effect compared to our base line up: Boosted scent that travels further to fill your room with fragrance.
Discover the beauty of fresh SugarPlums boosted with exotic fruit notes scent that travels to fill your room with fragrance.
With traditional plugs, we get used to to scents quickly and stop noticing them.
description: Product description Ingredients Linalool, 2.4-Dimethyl-3-Cyclohexene Carboxaldehyde, Benzyl Salicylate, Amyl Cinnamal, Dihydromyrcene, Citronellol, Delta-Damascone, Ethyl 2, 2-Dimethylhydrocinnamal, Geranyl Acetate, Alpha-Damascone, Pentamethylheptenone, Ethyl Methylphenylglycidate, Limonene, Nerol, 1H-Indene-Ar-Propanal, 2.3-Dihydro-1.1-Dimethyl, Geraniol, Citral, 1-Cyclohexene-1-Propanal, 4.4-Dimethyl-, Linalyl Acetate, Hydroxycitronellal, Cyclamen Aldehyde, Neryl Acetate, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Dimethyl-3-Cyclohexene-1-Carbaldehyde, Dimethyl Heptenal, Eugenol, Isoeugenol Ingredients Linalool, 2.4-Dimethyl-3-Cyclohexene Carboxaldehyde, Benzyl Salicylate, Amyl Cinnamal, Dihydromyrcene, Citronellol, Delta-Damascone, Ethyl 2, 2-Dimethylhydrocinnamal, Geranyl Acetate, Alpha-Damascone, Pentamethylheptenone, Ethyl Methylphenylglycidate, Limonene, Nerol, 1H-Indene-Ar-Propanal, 2.3-Dihydro-1.1-Dimethyl, Geraniol, Citral, 1-Cyclohexene-1-Propanal, 4.4-Dimethyl-, Linalyl Acetate, Hydroxycitronellal, Cyclamen Aldehyde, Neryl Acetate, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Dimethyl-3-Cyclohexene-1-Carbaldehyde, Dimethyl Heptenal, Eugenol, Isoeugenol Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP, UK See more
